description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior features a mix of light brown, white, and gray wall finishes, with large windows and a visible garage. The property includes a driveway, a parked car, and a landscaped front yard with several trees and shrubs. The house has multiple rooms visible from above, including what appear to be bedrooms, bathrooms, and a living area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the main entryway is set back from the street, adjacent to the garage. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on open, accessible spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and landscaped front yard featuring trees and shrubs. The exterior is finished in light brown, white, and gray tones.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side yard, the main entryway, and the driveway with a car parked near the front, as well as the arrangement of rooms and landscaping.
description_view_1: This view shows the front facade, the garage door, the main entryway, and the full extent of the driveway and front yard landscaping.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the rear and side of the house, with visible backyard landscaping and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the back of the house, showing the rear wall, additional windows, and the continuation of the flat roof and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door adjacent to the garage, no porch or steps, minimal overhang, and simple modern styling.
